Configuration module

class Configuration.BaseConfig[source]

Bases: object

Base configuration class for experiments.

Handles parsing command-line arguments, setting up dataset paths, creating experiment directories, and saving configuration files.

initialize(parse=True, **extra_kwargs)[source]

Parse CLI arguments, override with extra kwargs, and set up directories.

Parameters:

  • parse (bool) – Whether to parse command-line arguments. Set False when using this class in a GUI (e.g., Streamlit) to avoid argparse conflicts.

  • **extra_kwargs – Keyword arguments that override parsed CLI args (e.g., dataset=”MNIST”, lr=0.001).

Returns:

Self, fully initialized and ready for use.

Return type:

BaseConfig

parse() → None[source]

Hook method for subclasses to add extra arguments before parsing.

Can be overridden by subclasses if additional CLI arguments are needed.

Configuration.get_optimizer(name='Adam')[source]

Return a PyTorch optimizer class by its name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Name of the optimizer (e.g., “Adam”, “RMSprop”).

Returns:

Corresponding PyTorch optimizer class.

Return type:

torch.optim.Optimizer
